name: nestjs-dd-manual-app
description: Manual dd-trace variant for the Datadog instrumentation lab

scripts.build: rm -rf tmp/manual-src dist && mkdir -p tmp/manual-src && cp -R ../app/src/. tmp/manual-src/ && cp tracer.ts tmp/manual-src/tracer.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: rm -rf tmp/manual-src && mkdir -p tmp/manual-src && cp -R ../app/src/. tmp/manual-src/ && cp tracer.ts tmp/manual-src/tracer.ts && eslint "tmp/manual-src/**/*.ts"
